name: Zayt Vector Kit v3
notes: v3 uses richer gradients, clipped highlights, blush, softer arms/feet, leaf gloss, and glow/shadow layers.
All exports share the same viewBox and can be stacked without repositioning.
Recommended animation pivots: leaf around (255,54), arms around (164,318)/(348,318), face around (256,302), body scale around (256,360), glow opacity around center.
Keep the mascot off Mushaf/Quran text surfaces; use it for Home, onboarding, flashcards, progress, and empty states.
